goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { closure(s).contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not (x0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ closure(s) or (-x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) }) }(bound2)
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closure(s) or (-bound2 <= x0 and x0 <= bound2) } or not bound2 > 0

w0 ∈ closure(s)
not (-bound2 <= w0 and w0 <= bound2)
